question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 45.00% on 2026-04-25 for the Metaculus question "Will Anthropic file an initial registration statement (S-1) with the SEC to launch an IPO, before July 1, 2026?"?
summary: This meta-prediction asks whether the CP on Anthropic's S-1 filing question will be strictly above 45% on April 25. The CP has declined steadily from 66% to 45% over 5 weeks, and all recent news consistently places the Anthropic IPO timeline at Q4 2026 (October), not H1 2026. No S-1 has been filed with the SEC. The CP is currently at exactly 45.00% — the threshold — so the status quo resolves NO. With strong downward momentum, reinforcing fundamentals, and no visible catalysts for reversal, the most likely outcome is continued decline or stasis at/below 45%. I estimate ~30% probability of YES, accounting for small random perturbations that could temporarily push CP above the threshold.

factors.description: Strong, uninterrupted downward CP trend: 66% → 66% → 66% → 57% → 50% → 45% over 5 weeks, averaging ~4-5pp decline per week recently (from question-provided weekly snapshots).
Current CP is exactly at the 45.00% threshold. For YES, it must be strictly above 45.00%. Status quo (unchanged CP) resolves NO.

Fundamentals strongly support continued CP decline: all recent reporting (Bloomberg, The Information, multiple outlets) consistently places IPO timeline at Q4 2026 / October 2026, not H1 2026. No S-1 on SEC EDGAR confirmed.
No positive catalysts visible: tender offer showed employees expecting H2 IPO, SpaceX (not Anthropic) is the one filing confidentially with the SEC.
Random volatility factor: with 82 forecasters using recency-weighted median, small perturbations from individual forecast updates could temporarily push CP slightly above 45%.
Time pressure: ~9 days until check date. Each passing day without S-1 filing reduces the underlying probability further, reinforcing downward CP pressure.

reasoning:
**Forecast: 0.30 (30% probability YES)**

Key reasoning:

- **CP trend is strongly downward**: The community prediction has fallen from 66% to 45% over 5 weeks — a consistent, steep decline with no reversals.
- **Threshold is tight**: The CP sits at exactly 45.00%. Since the question requires *strictly above* 45%, the status quo resolves NO.
- **Fundamentals reinforce decline**: Every recent report (Bloomberg, The Information, multiple financial outlets) places Anthropic's IPO at Q4 2026 / October 2026. No S-1 has been filed — confirmed via SEC EDGAR. Only SpaceX has filed confidentially; Anthropic has not.
- **No reversal catalysts**: No credible reporting suggests an accelerated filing timeline. The recent tender offer showed employees holding shares for an H2 2026 IPO.
- **Upside risk**: Random forecaster updates could nudge the recency-weighted median slightly above 45%, and an unexpected announcement could shift sentiment. This accounts for the 30% rather than something lower.

resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the community prediction of the Metaculus question found [here](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/41206) (i.e. the 'target question'). If the community prediction of the target question on 2026-04-25 04:56:27 is higher than 45.00%, this question will resolve to 'Yes'. If it is lower or equal to 45.00%, this question will resolve to 'No'. If the target question has already resolved before this question opens, then this question will be annulled. If the target question resolves after this question opens, but before 2026-04-25 04:56:27, then this question will resolve to the same value as the target question.
